harness.all_inactive_mask_behavior: all runtime-threshold compare-false lanes keep out[0] equal to the scalar seed and preserve non-scalar output sentinels
harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.inactive_lane_contract: inactive lanes must use the operation-specific neutral contract before the horizontal reduction even when their payload values are nonzero
harness.mask_coverage_contract: multi-lane runtime_scalar_cmp_masked_standalone_reduce_add cases require runtime scalar threshold active/inactive mask lanes plus an all-inactive mask oracle
harness.reduction_contract: only active masked lanes contribute signed int32_t source payload values to the scalar add reduction with the typed scalar seed
harness.scalar_result_contract: only out[0] is written and non-scalar output slots preserve sentinels
harness.source_pattern_contract: two compare/source input patterns, two runtime scalar threshold values, and two scalar seeds prove active-lane source contribution, source preservation, seed preservation, and multi-VL runtime n behavior

mask_tail_policy_boundary.active_lane_contract: runtime scalar compare-true lanes contribute source values to the scalar standalone reduction
mask_tail_policy_boundary.all_inactive_mask_behavior: scalar result remains the seed in out[0]
